name: Peppermint Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the gelatin according to package instructions using 1 envelope and 1/4 cup cold water.
2. Mix the melted margarine with the chocolate wafer crumbs in a bowl until well combined.
3. Combine the softened cream cheese, sugar, milk, crushed peppermint candy, and whipped cream in another bowl.
4. Gradually fold the prepared gelatin mixture into the cream cheese batter.
5. Stir in the finely chopped milk chocolate candy bars until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
6. Pour the batter into a greased springform pan, spreading it to an even thickness.
7. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until set completely.
8. Before serving, allow the cheesecake to cool slightly before removing from the pan and slicing.
